positive: A whimsical, intricate celestial map composed of deep indigo and ethereal gold dust. The central subject is a stylized silhouette of a meditating cosmic figure (Yogi/Satori pose) adorned with astronomical motifs: constellations formed by delicate glowing lines, crescent moons, and orbiting planets (Jupiter, Saturn). The composition should be perfectly balanced and symmetrical, resembling an engraving or mandalic print. Use deep cosmic nebulas gradients transitioning into crisp, flat areas for excellent print separation. High contrast, linework style, reminiscent of Art Nouveau etching meets vaporwave bioluminescence. Vector art quality, suitable for repeating pattern background, crisp lines, perfect circular crop, high detail.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, bad anatomy, disfigured, multiple limbs, signature, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, grain
